title: Sprūds will continue work at the Saeima after resignation
summary_full: Resigned Defence Minister Andris Sprūds (Progressives) will return to his position in the Saeima, the LETA news agency learned from the Ministry of Defence.
summary_public: Resigned Defence Minister Andris Sprūds (Progressives) will return to his position in the Saeima, the LETA news agency learned from the Ministry of Defence.
